name: parallel-web
tagline: Wraps Parallel's CLI (search, extract, deep research, enrichment, entity discovery, monitoring) behind an API key.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill. It explicitly instructs the agent to treat fetched web content as untrusted and never follow embedded instructions, forbids printing/logging the API key, pins the installed CLI version, and caps polling loops. The only soft spot is trusting the third-party 'parallel-web-tools' PyPI package and the Parallel API itself, which can't be

highlights.summary: Installs a third-party CLI, 'parallel-web-tools[cli]==0.7.1', from an external index (line 75). Version is pinned and installed in an isolated uv tool env, which mitigates but does not eliminate relia
